attributes.title: CrewAI · Totals
attributes.visState: {"title": "CrewAI \u00b7 Totals", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "sum", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "cost"}, "customLabel": "Total cost (USD)"}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "sum", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "prompt_tokens"}, "customLabel": "Input tokens"}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "sum", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "tokens"}, "customLabel": "Output tokens"}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}, "customLabel": "Events"}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgFill": "#000", "bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "", "fontSize": 36}}}}

attributes.title: Cost per agent (USD)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Cost per agent (USD)", "type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "sum", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "cost"}, "customLabel": "Cost (USD)"}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "agent_name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 10, "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "nestedLegend": false, "truncateLegend": true, "maxLegendLines": 1, "distinctColors": false, "isDonut": true, "emptySizeRatio": 0.3, "palette": {"type": "palette", "name": "default"}, "labels": {"show": true, "last_level": true, "values": true, "valuesFormat": "value", "percentDecimals": 2, "truncate": 100, "position": "default"}}}

attributes.title: Tokens per agent
attributes.visState: {"title": "Tokens per agent", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "sum", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "prompt_tokens"}, "customLabel": "Input tokens"}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "sum", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "tokens"}, "customLabel": "Output tokens"}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "agent_name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 15, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Tokens"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"label": "Tokens", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false}}}

attributes.title: Calls per agent by type
attributes.visState: {"title": "Calls per agent by type", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}, "customLabel": "Calls"}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "agent_name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 15, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "type", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 5, "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Number of calls"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "grouped", "data": {"label": "Number of calls", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false}}}

attributes.title: Latency per call, per agent (ms)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Latency per call, per agent (ms)", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "latency_ms"}, "customLabel": "Avg latency (ms)"}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "latency_ms"}, "customLabel": "Max latency (ms)"}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "agent_name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 15, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Latency (ms)"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "grouped", "data": {"label": "Latency (ms)", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false}}}

attributes.title: Cost over time (USD)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Cost over time (USD)", "type": "area", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "sum", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "cost"}, "customLabel": "Cost (USD)"}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "timestamp", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "area", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Cost (USD)"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "area", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"label": "Cost (USD)", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false}}}

attributes.visState: {"title": "Avg latency over time (ms)", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "latency_ms"}, "customLabel": "Avg latency (ms)"}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "timestamp", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Latency (ms)"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"label": "Latency (ms)", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false}}}

attributes.title: Latency per report (by agent)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Latency per report (by agent)", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "latency_ms"}, "customLabel": "Max latency (ms)"}, {"id": "5", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "latency_ms"}, "customLabel": "Avg latency (ms)"}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}, "customLabel": "Calls"}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "report_id", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 20, "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "agent_name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 10, "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"perPage": 10, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": "", "sort": {"columnIndex": null, "direction": null}}}

attributes.title: CrewAI · AI Agent Observability
attributes.description: Tokens, cost, call counts and latency per CrewAI agent and per report — sourced from crewai-logs-stats via Elasticsearch.
